summary: Good front‑of‑house recording captures a jazzy set with standout Truckin and Let It Grow.
review: Both reviewers praise the show as very jazzy and jam‑heavy, highlighting a spectacularly wild Truckin and the mood‑setting Let It Grow that launches the second set. The Front‑of‑House (FOB) recording is described as solid and an improvement over other Schoeps captures, making it pleasant to listen to.

ai_rating.rationale: Two 4‑star reviews consistently note a good performance and a solid FOB recording with no major complaints, leading to an overall rating just above four stars.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Good Front‑of‑House (FOB) mix; reviewers say it is better than other Schoeps versions and note no dropouts or major issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is praised for its jazzy, jam‑heavy vibe; Let It Grow is highlighted as setting the tone for an energetic second set.
